query:
-- SasBoss services without billing assignments - what are they?
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.monthlyCost, c.name as customerName
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.provider = 'SasBoss'
  AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated', 'flagged_for_termination')
  AND s.externalId NOT IN (SELECT serviceExternalId FROM service_billing_assignments)
  AND s.externalId NOT IN (SELECT serviceExternalId FROM unbillable_services)
  AND s.monthlyCost > 0
ORDER BY s.monthlyCost DESC
LIMIT 15;

-- SasBoss services without billing assignments - what are they?
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.monthlyCost, c.name as customerName
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.provider = 'SasBoss'
  AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated', 'flagged_for_termination')
  AND s.externalId NOT IN (SELECT serviceExternalId FROM service_billing_assignments)
  AND s.externalId NOT IN (SELECT serviceExternalId FROM unbillable_services)
  AND s.monthlyCost > 0
ORDER BY s.monthlyCost DESC
LIMIT 15;
